verse_text: behold, I shall even send a family from the north and lead them against this land, and against those living in it, and against all the nations round about her. I will make it desolate and give it up to destruction. I will render it a hissing and a perpetual disgrace.

links.context: God's judgment on Judah is justified, for the priests and the people have gone beyond the point of no return and will not repent (see [[2KI.25:8]]-21). Seventy years (v. 29) is the approximate time of the exile in Babylon (see also [[JER.25:9]]-12; 27:6-8; 29:10; Lv 26:34-43).
